Title: Diablo
Writer: Mat Sansom, Scott Adkins, Marko Zaror
Actors: Scott Adkins, Marko Zaror, Alanna De La Rossa
Plot: Kris Chaney, a recently released ex-convict embarks on a perilous mission. He kidnaps Elisa, daughter of Vicente, a powerful gangster, which puts them in danger from El Corvo, a psychopathic killer seeking revenge against Vicente'...
